title: Decorate Your Own Santa & Friends Cookies Kit 220g – Christmas Vanilla Cookie Decorating Set with Icing & Candy Decorations – Fun Festive Activity, Christmas Gifts for Kids, Stocking Filler
features: Create Festive Cookies for Santa – Make Christmas extra special by decorating your own Santa & Friends cookies, perfect for holiday fun.
Pre-Shaped Vanilla Cookies – No baking required! Cookies come ready-made so you can jump straight into decorating.
Includes Icing & Candy Decorations – Everything you need to design colourful, creative festive cookies.
Fun for Kids & Families – A joyful Christmas activity that sparks creativity and brings everyone together.
Perfect Christmas Gift Idea – Great for Christmas Eve boxes, stocking fillers, party activities, or festive baking treats.
description: Product description Get into the festive spirit with the Decorate Your Own Santa & Friends Cookies Kit 220g—a fun and easy Christmas cookie activity designed for kids, families, and holiday bakers of all ages. This delightful set includes pre-shaped vanilla cookies, along with icing and candy decorations, giving you everything you need to create colourful and charming Christmas treats. There’s nothing to bake—simply decorate and enjoy! Perfect for Christmas Eve traditions, family bonding, festive parties, or gifting to little ones who love to get creative. Decorate, design, and share the joy of Christmas with cookies made especially for Santa and his friends! Ingredients Wheat flour (wheat flour, calcium carbonate, iron, niacin, thiamin), sugar, salted sweetcream butter (cream: milk; salt), vegetable oil (palm, rapeseed, water, salt, natural flavouring), butterscotch flavoured toffee pieces (6%) (soft dark brown sugar, glucose syrup (wheat), butter (milk, salt), non-hydrogenated palm oil, natural flavour), natural flavouring, salt.
